---
id: delete-2
title: "Deactivate (soft-delete) a bank account"
description: "Sets is_active = false. FK references to cash_balances and ssis are preserved."
sidebar_label: "Deactivate (soft-delete) a bank account"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Deactivate (soft-delete) a bank account"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/bank-accounts/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets is_active = false. FK references to cash_balances and ssis are preserved.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
